titleStmt.title: Paris, Bibliothèque nationale de France, BnF Éthiopien d'Abbadie 111
Gospel of John, Horologium, other texts

publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

availability.licence: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

supportDesc.collation: The quire structure is difficult to discern.
supportDesc.condition: Both boards are split and repaired. Holes carefully repaired on fol. 21.

binding.decoNote: Leather quarter cover, possibly of European origin
A write thick thread inserted in the upper text prick of fol. 47

bibl.title: Notice sur les manuscrits éthiopiens de la Collection d’Abbadie
Extrait du Journal Asiatique
Catalogue des manuscrits éthiopiens de la Collection Antoine d’Abbadie
Catalogue raisonné de manuscrits éthiopiens appartenant à Antoine d’Abbadie

msItem.title: Saʿātāt za-gǝbṣ
msItem.note: A version similar to the text printed in Časoslov' ėfi̇opskoj cerkvi: izd. i perev. na osnovanii něskol'kich' rukopisejZapiski Imperatorskoj Akademii Nauk po Istoriko-Filologičeskomu OtdělenijuBorisTuraevSt. PétersbourgAcad. Imp. des Sciences1897Zapiski Imperatorskoj Akademii Nauk po Istoriko-Filologičeskomu Otděleniju77

msItem.title: First Hour
msItem.incipit: ጽሑፍ፡ ውስተ፡ መጽሐፈ፡ ኢሳይያስ፡ ነቢይ፡ አነ፡ እፌኑ፡ መልአከየ፡ ቅድመ፡ ገጽከ፡ ዘይጸይሕ፡ ፍኖተከ፡ ቅድሜከ፨ ቃለ፡ አዋዲ፡ ዘይሰብክ፡ በገዳም፡ ዘይብል፡ ጺሑኣ፡ ፍኖቶ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ ወዐርዩ፡ መጽያኅቶ፨ ወሀሎ፡ ዮሐንስ፡ ያጠምቅ፡ በገዳም፡ ወትብል፡ ዘንተ፡ ጸሎተ፡ ኦብርሃን፡ ዘበ፡ አማን፡ ዘያብርህ፡ ለኵሉ፡ ሰብእ፡ ለእለ፡ ይነብሩ፡ ውስተ፡ ዓለም፡ ወበእንተ፡ ፍቅረ፡ ሰብእ፡ መጻእከ፡ ውስተ፡ ዓለም፡
msItem.note: At least one leaf is missing at the beginning. Cp. the edited text, Časoslov' ėfi̇opskoj cerkvi: izd. i perev. na osnovanii něskol'kich' rukopisejZapiski Imperatorskoj Akademii Nauk po Istoriko-Filologičeskomu OtdělenijuBorisTuraevSt. PétersbourgAcad. Imp. des Sciences1897Zapiski Imperatorskoj Akademii Nauk po Istoriko-Filologičeskomu Otděleniju7712.

msItem.title: Hymn to Our Lady Mary
msItem.incipit: ኦመሰረተ፡ አንቲ፡ ለኵሉ፡ ዓለም፡ ዘኮንኪ፡ ማኅደሮ፡ ለዓቢይ፡ ወልዑል፡ አምላክ፨ መሐርኒ፡ ወአጽልሊ፡ ላዕሌየ፡ ጽላሌ፡ አልባብኪ፨

msItem.title: Prayer
msItem.incipit: በስመ፡ አብ፡ ወወልድ፡ ወመንፈስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ አሐዱ፡ አምላክ። ረስየነ፡ እግዚኦ፡ ድልዋነ፡ ንክሥት፡ አፉነ፡ ከመ፡ ንሰብሕከ፡ በልብ፡ ንጹሕ፡ ወበልሳን፡ ዘኢያረምም፡

msItem.title: ʾO-ʾǝgziʾǝna wa-'amlakǝna ʾIyasus Krǝstos walda ʾǝgziʾabǝḥer ḥǝyāw lǝʿul diba kʷǝllu
msItem.incipit: ኦእግዚእነ፡ ወአምላክነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ወልደ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ሕያው፡ ልዑል፡ ዲበ፡ ኵሉ፡ ኀይለ፡ ቅዱሰን፡ ሀበነ፡ ረድኤተ፡ ከመ፡ ንሖር፡ በኅግከ፡ ወበሥርዓትከ፡ ኵሎ፡ መዋዕለ፡ ሕይወትነ፨እእግዚኦ፡ ምህረነ፡ ትእዛዛቲከ፡ ማኅየዊተ፡ ከመ፡ ንርከብ፡ ሣህለ፡ ወምሕረተ፡ በቅድመ፡ መንበርከ፡ ልዑል፡

msItem.title: Sawwǝr ʾǝmlāʿlana kǝbada ḫaṭāwǝ'ina ʾo-ʾǝgziʾo
msItem.incipit: ሰውር፡ እምላዕሌነ፡ ክብደ፡ ኀጣውኢነ፡ ኦእግዚኦ፡ ኩን፡ ደምሳሴ፡ ወሰዳዴ፡ ለኵሉ፡ ሕሊና፡ እኩይ፡ ነጽር፡ ላዕሌነ፡ እግዚኦ፡ በአዕይንቲከ፨

msItem.title: Wǝddāse ba-sanbata krǝstiyān
msItem.incipit: ወዳሴ፡ በሰንበተ፡ ክርስቲያንእግዚአብሔር፡ አኀዜ፡ ኩሉ፡ ዓለም፡ ንጉሠ፡ ነገሥት፡ ወእግዚእ፡ አጋእስት፡ ወስልጣናት፡ ዘትቤላ፡ ለማርያም፡ እምከ፨ ንዒ፡ ርግብየ፡ ወንዒ፡ ሠናይትየ፡ እንዘ፡ አመቱ፡ ልዑል፡ እሙ፡ ረሰያ፡ ዘመጽአ፡ ኀቤኪ፡ በመንክር፡ ግርማ፡ ፍሥሒ፡ ለኪ፡ ምርያም፨

msItem.title: Ḥassāba rәtuʿ
msItem.incipit:
በ፩ዓመት፡ ፲ወ፩አበቅቴ፡ አመ፲ወ፱ለመስከረም፡ መጥቅዕ፨ በ፪ዓመት፡ ፳ወ፪አበቅቴ፡ አመ፰ለጥቅምት፡ መጥቅዕ፨ በ፫ዓመት፡ ፫አበቅቴ፡ አመ፳ወ፯ለመስከረም፡ መጥቅዕ፨
ሐሳበ፡ ርቱዕ፡ እንተ፡ ኀበ፡ ይቀርብ፡ በ፡ ፲፩፡ አበቅቴ፡ አም፲ወ፱፡ ለመስከረም፡ መጥቅዕ። በ፳ወ፪አበቅቴ፡ አመ፡ ፰ለጥቅምት፡ መጥቅዕ፨
msItem.note: The passage on seems to be a rearrangement of the next portion that is the initial part of the treatise (beginning on ).

layout.note: The number of characters per line: 12-13 on .
Data on text area and margin dimensions taken from
layout.ab: The upper line is written under the ruling, on some leaves above the ruling.

handNote.seg: Incipits of textparts and single prayers, elements of punctuation signs, numerals, the name of the commissioner. Careful, regular; by a trained scribe.

handNote.locus: The Postscript of the Gospel of John.
handNote.desc: A careful secondary hand that added Gospel of John: Colophon of the Gospel of John.
A hand that wrote the main part of .
The hand that wrote the main part of .
The hand that wrote the extension of (stopped at King Takla Hāymānot (d. 1708).
The hand that included the rubricated name of ʾAmlākāwi, throughout the manuscript; possibly the same hand added the name of King Takla Hāymānot (d. 1708) as the last in the list of kings in .

decoNote.desc: A fine bichrome (red, yellow) ornamental band.
Miniature of the Antony, with a rubricated legend ሥዕለ፡ አባ፡ እንጦንስ፡, protexted by a textile curtain.
A fine small monochrome (red) ornamental band.

item.q: በነገረ፡ ልደትነ፡ ወቁርጸት፡ ዳውጃሆሙ፡ ወይዘሮ፡ ትኩብት፡ ወለደ፡ አርኬ፡ ነገደ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ወማርያም፡ ክብራ። ፫አኃው፡ አርኪ፡ ቢውልድ፡ ማሙች፡ ወማሙች፡ ብትወልድ፡ ቢሌለዋ፡ ወሌለዋ፡ ብትወልድ፡ ደጅአዝማች፡ ኤሎስ፡ ወደጅ፡ አዝማች፡ ኤሎሎስ፡ ወለዱ፡ እሜት፡ ደባርዋ፡ ወምቤት፡ ደባርዋ፡ ወለዱ፡ አቤቶ፡ ኤሎስ። ነገደ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ቢወልድ፡ ትገዛኚ፡ ወለቶ፡ ትገዛኝ፡ ወለቶ፡ ብትወልድ፡ ተክለ፡ ክርስቶስ። ወተክለ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ቤሐደራ፡ ማርያም፡ ወሐደራ፡ ማርያም፡ ወለደት፡ ዜና፡ ገብርኤል፡ በስሜ፡ ልደትነ፡ ዳግመ፡ ድል፡ ሰገድ፡ ቢወልድ፡ ሐደሮ፡ ወለተ፡ ማርያም፡ ብትወልድ፡ ወልደ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ወሐደ፡ ረ፡ ማርያም፡ ወለዱ፡ ዜና፡ ገብርኤል። በአንጐጐት፡ ልደትነ። በስልዮስ፡ ቢወልድ፡ ራስ፡ ዓምዱ፡ ራስ፡ ዓምዱ፡ ቢወልድ፡ ዘወልደ፡ ማርያም፡ ወጥዕት፡ ማርያም፡ ፪አኃው፡ ወጥዕት፡ ማርያም፡ ወለደት፡ ርግበ፡ ስላሴ፡ ወለደት፡ ሐደረ፡ ማርያም፡ ወሐደረ፡ ማርያም፡ ወለደት፡ ዜና፡ ገብርኤል።። በከቲና፡ ል
item.note: The genealogies, not fully understandable and with many orthographic peculiarities, have been added in a more recent hand.

item.desc: Unclear note, possibly on the length of the days in the 12 months of the year
item.q: በወርኃ፡ ሕዳር፡ ፲መዓልት፡ ፲ወ፩፡ ሌሊት፡ በወርኃ፡ ታኅሣሥ፡

item.desc: A summary of chronology from Adam listing Ethiopian kings up to King Takla Haymānot I. It has been started by , possibly in the time of King Galāwdewos. Later it was extended by , and the last name, of King Takla Hāymānot, was included possibly around 1708 by
item.q: በዘተአምር፡ ኆልቈ፡ ዓመታት፡ እምዓመተ፡ አዳም፡ ዘኮነ፡ በበዘመኑ፡ እምአዳም፡ እስከ፡ ኖኅ፡ ፳፻። እምኖኅ፡ እስከ፡ አብርሃም፡ ፲፻፮፻፡ ዓመት። እም፡ አብርሃም፡ እስከ፡ ሙሴ፡ ፬፻፡ ዓመት። ገላውዴዎስ፡ ነግሠ፡ ፲፰፡ ዓመተ። ወ፯አውራኃ። ሚናስ፡ ነግሠ፡ ፬፡ ዓመተ። ኢያሱ፡ ነግሠ፡ ፳ወ፬። ተክለ፡ ሃይማኖት፡ ነግሠ፡ ፪ዓመት፡

item.desc:
Kings list listing
the kings from Solomon to King Takla Haymānot I.
item.q: ጸሐፍነ፡ ዘንተ፡ ጥዑመ፡ ንባብ፡ ወሠናይ፡ መዘገብ፡ በሤጥ፡ ዘኢይትረከብ። ዘከመ፡ ነግሡ፡ ሃገረ፡ ኢትዮጵያ፡ እምዘርአ፡ ዳዊት፡ ንጉሥ። ዳዊት፡ ንጉሥ፡ ወለዶ፡ ለሰሎሞን፡ ንጉሥ። ወሰሎሞን፡ ወለዶ፡ ለእብነ፡ ሐኪም፡ ወአንገሦ፡ በብሔረ፡ ኢትዮጵያ፡ ወሰመዮ፡ ስሞ፡ ሰሎሞን። ወነግሠ፡ በአኵሱም። ወሰመይዎ፡ ስሞ፡ ብእሲ፡ አጋቦ፡ ወእምድኅሬሁ፡ እለ፡ ነግሡ፡ በኢትዮጵያ፡ በሀገረ፡ አኵሱም፡ አስማቲሆሙ፡ ከመዝ። ዘግዱር፡ ሰበበስዮ። ተዋስያ። ሐንደና።
item.note: Variants in the kings' names are listed in Notice sur les manuscrits éthiopiens de la Collection d’AbbadieExtrait du Journal AsiatiqueCarloConti RossiniParisImprimerie nationale1914Extrait du Journal Asiatique26

item.desc: Stamps of the library on the inner side of the front boards and several folia.
The shelfmark of the Bibliothèque nationale, no. 111, is written on the recto-side of the unfoliated first leaf.
Stamp of the Library, shelfmark and the name of Antoine d’Abbadie [d’Arrast].
Scribbles, crude designs of a five-pointed star or cross.
Use of a smaller script over erased text.

history.origin: 15th century. The owner of the manuscript was ʾAmlākāwi, mentioned in the concluding formulas, on , , , and many others. His name has been added in a secondary hand, in some places obviously instead of another name that was erased (e.g. , , ). At a few places, the name of ʾAmlākāwi was overwritten with still another name, ʾAragāwi (, , , ).

msItem.title: Fǝkkāre ʾIyasus
msItem.incipit: በስመ፡ አብ፡ ወወልድ፡ ወመንፈስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ አሐዱ፡ አምላክ። ወዝንቱ፡ ነገር፡ ወፍካሪ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ወተስእልዎ፡ አርዳኢሁ፡ ወእንዘ፡ ይመስሐ፡ ምስለሆሙ፡ ወሐተትዎ፡ ወይቤልዎ፡ እስኩ፡ ንግረኒ፡ ኦሊቅነ፡ በደኅሪ፡ ትውልድ፡ ዘይመጽእ፡ መዋዕል፡ ምንተ፡ ይከውን፡ ተእምርቱ። ወአውሦሙ፡
msItem.note: Cp. Fǝkkare IyäsusEAeEncyclopaedia AethiopicaDenisNosnitsinUhligWiesbadenHarrassowitz Verlag2005II516b-518a and Addenda et CorrigendaEAeEncyclopaedia AethiopicaAlessandroBausiSiegbertUhligWiesbadenHarrassowitz Verlag2014V559-579564.

supportDesc.condition: One leaf () has the bottom outer corner missing, the damage have been carefully repaired with a piece of parchment.

layout.note: The number of characters per line: 11-12 on .
Data on text area and margin dimensions taken from .
layout.ab: Pricking and ruling are partly visible.
The upper line is written under the ruling.
layout.note: The pricking has been executed inaccurately.

handNote.desc: Careful but irregular; by a scribe of inferior training than that of the main . Probably somewhat of the same period or even somewhat older than . The scribe employed the paragraph sign (four dods and a dash) at each written line, except on and

decoDesc.decoNote: A crude bichrome (red, black) ornamental band. On the top of it a small red frame is mounted, with a few rubricated letters, ወፈነወ፶መሴ.

item.note: Written in a very crude hand, in part poorly readable. It mentions ʾAmlākāwi not only as owner but also as scribe (however, the name seems to have been added later, over an erasure).

history.origin: might be of comparable age or even somewhat older than . is of more recent time and seems to mention the same owner, ʾAmlākāwi. It is not clear whether was a part of a dispersed manuscript or a separate circulation unit. It was probably with and in the same binding by the time when it was owned by ʾAmlākāwi.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)
